message:
Add config profile management module for wa.toml overlays

- New config_profiles.rs: ConfigProfileManifest and ConfigProfileManifestEntry
  types for managing named configuration overlays with versioning, timestamps,
  descriptions, and last-applied tracking; ConfigProfileSummary for compact
  profile info display
- lib.rs: Export new config_profiles module

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
